title: U.S. strikes Iran and Houthis threaten Saudi Arabia shipping as mediators push 10-day ceasefire
summary_full: The latest cycle of strikes comes amid reports that regional mediators have presented Washington and Tehran with a proposal for a 10-day ceasefire.
summary_public: The latest cycle of strikes comes amid reports that regional mediators have presented Washington and Tehran with a proposal for a 10-day ceasefire.
